query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "spatialclaw: rethinking action interface for agentic spatial reasoning" computer science
rationale: This paper belongs in the literature review because it addresses the same core domain of agentic spatial reasoning and 3D world interaction, serving as a canonical alternative-vocabulary cluster (category f) and a foundational methodology reference (category d) for the "SpatialClaw" follow-up, even though it proposes a different specific agent architecture (LEO) rather than the exact "SpatialClaw" interface.
